property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-17.0.19.10-hotspot\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-17.0.19.10-hotspot\bin;C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-25.0.2.10-hotspot\bin;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\java8path;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Program Files\Python312\Scripts\;C:\Program Files\Python312\;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\MinGW\bin;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Program Files\Amazon\AWSCLIV2\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Shell 8.0\bin\;C:\Users\Asus\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;;C:\Users\Asus\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\Asus\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Users\Asus\AppData\Local\Programs\Antigravity\bin;.

testcase.name: employeeCanSubmitClaim
testcase.system-out:
2026-05-27T12:35:45.696+05:30 INFO 11004 --- [reimbursement-portal] [ main] t.c.s.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils : Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.reimbursement.reimbursementportal.controller.ClaimControllerTest]: ClaimControllerTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 2026-05-27T12:35:45.711+05:30 INFO 11004 --- [reimbursement-portal] [ main] .b.t.c.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper : Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.reimbursement.reimbursementportal.ReimbursementPortalApplication for test class com.reimbursement.reimbursementportal.controller.ClaimControllerTest 2026-05-27T12:35:45.714+05:30 INFO 11004 --- [reimbursement-portal] [ main] t.c.s.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils : Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.reimbursement.reimbursementportal.controller.ClaimControllerTest]: ClaimControllerTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 2026-05-27T12:35:45.724+05:30 INFO 11004 --- [reimbursement-portal] [ main] .b.t.c.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper : Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.reimbursement.reimbursementportal.ReimbursementPortalApplication for test class com.reimbursement.reimbursementportal.controller.ClaimControllerTest

testcase.name: invalidClaimRequestReturnsBadRequest
testcase.system-out:
2026-05-27T12:35:48.587+05:30 INFO 11004 --- [reimbursement-portal] [ main] c.r.r.config.RequestLoggingFilter : API Request: POST /api/claims IP=127.0.0.1 2026-05-27T12:35:48.645+05:30 ERROR 11004 --- [reimbursement-portal] [ main] c.r.r.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : Exception occurred: Amount must be greater than 0
org.springframework.web.bind.MethodArgumentNotValidException: Validation failed for argument [0] in public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<com.reimbursement.reimbursementportal.dto.StandardAPIResponse<com.reimbursement.reimbursementportal.dto.response.ClaimResponseDTO>> com.reimbursement.reimbursementportal.controller.ClaimController.submitClaim(com.reimbursement.reimbursementportal.dto.request.ClaimRequestDTO): [Field error in object 'claimRequestDTO' on field 'amount': rejected value [-1.0]; codes [Positive.claimRequestDTO.amount,Positive.amount,Positive.java.lang.Double,Positive]; arguments [org.springframework.context.support.DefaultMessageSourceResolvable: codes [claimRequestDTO.amount,amount]; arguments []; default message [amount]]; default message [Amount must be greater than 0]] at 2026-05-27T12:35:48.690+05:30 INFO 11004 --- [reimbursement-portal] [ main] c.r.r.config.RequestLoggingFilter : API Response: POST /api/claims Status=400 Time=103ms IP=127.0.0.1

testcase.name: unauthenticatedClaimRequestIsUnauthorized
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-27T12:35:48.723+05:30 WARN 11004 --- [reimbursement-portal] [ main] c.r.r.config.SecurityConfig : Unauthorized access detected: GET /api/claims

testcase.name: managerCanFetchReviewerClaimsAndTakeAction
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-27T12:35:48.757+05:30 INFO 11004 --- [reimbursement-portal] [ main] c.r.r.config.RequestLoggingFilter : API Request: GET /api/claims/reviewer/2 IP=127.0.0.1 2026-05-27T12:35:48.772+05:30 INFO 11004 --- [reimbursement-portal] [ main] c.r.r.controller.ClaimController : Fetch claims by reviewer request received: reviewerId=2 2026-05-27T12:35:48.775+05:30 INFO 11004 --- [reimbursement-portal] [ main] c.r.r.controller.ClaimController : Fetch claims by reviewer request completed: reviewerId=2, total=1 2026-05-27T12:35:48.797+05:30 INFO 11004 --- [reimbursement-portal] [ main] c.r.r.config.RequestLoggingFilter : API Response: GET /api/claims/reviewer/2 Status=200 Time=40ms IP=127.0.0.1 2026-05-27T12:35:48.830+05:30 INFO 11004 --- [reimbursement-portal] [ main] c.r.r.config.RequestLoggingFilter : API Request: PUT /api/claims/10/action/2 IP=127.0.0.1 2026-05-27T12:35:48.852+05:30 INFO 11004 --- [reimbursement-portal] [ main] c.r.r.controller.ClaimController : Claim status update request received: claimId=10, reviewerId=2, status=APPROVED 2026-05-27T12:35:48.853+05:30 INFO 11004 --- [reimbursement-portal] [ main] c.r.r.controller.ClaimController : Claim status update request completed: claimId=10, status=APPROVED 2026-05-27T12:35:48.862+05:30 INFO 11004 --- [reimbursement-portal] [ main] c.r.r.config.RequestLoggingFilter : API Response: PUT /api/claims/10/action/2 Status=200 Time=32ms IP=127.0.0.1
